children.text: Send invoices, automatic reconciliation, track billable hours, get financial insights, and export clean books to your accountant.

Everything you need to run your business
Invoicing, transactions, time tracking, customers, and files — all connected in one system.
Midday removes manual work so you can spend time on what actually matters.
